backstory.original: Minsc is a dim-witted but ferociously courageous ranger who saved Baldur's Gate and the surrounding area several times over the course of his adventures. He's accompanied by his stalwart companion Boo; a miniature giant space hamster.
backstory.display: 明斯克是一位头脑简单但十分勇猛的巡林客，他在冒险旅程中多次拯救了博德之门和周边地区。他身边有一位坚强的伙伴布布，它是一只小型的太空巨仓鼠。

description.original: Minsc cleaves all targets near the closest enemy.
description.display: 明斯克顺劈距离最近的敌人附近的所有目标。

description.original: Minsc and Boo attack together, dealing massive cleaving damage.
description.display: 明斯克和布布同时攻击，造成高额顺劈伤害。

longDescription.original: Minsc swings his greatsword in a massive circle centered on the front-most enemy while Boo leaps about causing up to 5 random enemies to take additional damage for the next 30 seconds.
longDescription.display: 明斯克挥动大剑，以最前方的敌人为圆心画一个巨大的圆圈，同时布布跃起，使最多 5 个随机敌人在接下来的 30 秒内受到额外伤害。

description.desc: Humanoid enemies become a Favored Foe and take $(amount)% extra damage from the party.
类人生物敌人成为偏好对手，队伍对其造成的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

specializationDescription.original: Minsc favors hunting Humanoid enemies. They take additional damage from the party.
specializationDescription.display: 明斯克喜欢猎杀类人生物敌人。队伍对其造成的伤害提高。

tipText.original: Minsc has a history with Humanoid enemies, so with his direction the party does additional damage to any Humanoids.
tipText.display: 明斯克与类人生物敌人素有渊源，因此在他的指示下，队伍对所有人形造成额外伤害。

description.desc: Beast enemies become a Favored Foe and take $(amount)% extra damage from the party.
兽类敌人成为偏好对手，队伍对其造成的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

specializationDescription.original: Minsc favors hunting Beast enemies. They take additional damage from the party.
specializationDescription.display: 明斯克喜欢猎杀兽类敌人。队伍对其造成的伤害提高。

tipText.original: Minsc has a history with Beast enemies, so with his direction the party does additional damage to any Beasts.
tipText.display: 明斯克与兽类敌人素有渊源，因此在他的指示下，队伍对所有兽类造成额外伤害。

description.desc: Undead enemies become a Favored Foe and take $(amount)% extra damage from the party.
亡灵敌人成为偏好对手，队伍对其造成的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

specializationDescription.original: Minsc favors hunting Undead enemies. They take additional damage from the party.
specializationDescription.display: 明斯克喜欢猎杀亡灵敌人。队伍对其造成的伤害提高。

tipText.original: Minsc has a history with Undead enemies, so with his direction the party does additional damage to any Undead.
tipText.display: 明斯克与亡灵敌人素有渊源，因此在他的指示下，队伍对所有亡灵造成额外伤害。

description.desc: Fey enemies become a Favored Foe and take $(amount)% extra damage from the party.
精类生物敌人成为偏好对手，队伍对其造成的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

specializationDescription.original: Minsc favors hunting Fey enemies. They take additional damage from the party.
specializationDescription.display: 明斯克喜欢猎杀精类生物敌人。队伍对其造成的伤害提高。

tipText.original: Minsc has a history with Fey enemies, so with his direction the party does additional damage to any Fey.
tipText.display: 明斯克与精类生物敌人素有渊源，因此在他的指示下，队伍对所有精类生物造成额外伤害。

description.desc: Monstrosity enemies become a Favored Foe and take $(amount)% extra damage from the party.
怪兽敌人成为偏好对手，队伍对其造成的伤害提高 $(amount)%。

specializationDescription.original: Minsc favors hunting Monstrosity enemies. They take additional damage from the party.
specializationDescription.display: 明斯克喜欢猎杀怪兽敌人。队伍对其造成的伤害提高。

tipText.original: Minsc has a history with Monstrosity enemies, so with his direction the party does additional damage to any Monstrosities.
tipText.display: 明斯克与怪兽敌人素有渊源，因此在他的指示下，队伍对所有妖精造成额外伤害。

description.desc: Whenever a non-boss enemy wave spawns, there is a $(desc_chance_for_one)% chance of an extra enemy spawning, and a $(desc_chance_for_two)% chance of 2 extra enemies spawning. These enemies will always be Minsc's Favored Foe.
每当非首领敌人波次刷新时，有 $(desc_chance_for_one)% 几率额外刷新一名敌人，有 $(desc_chance_for_two)% 几率额外刷新 2 名敌人。这些敌人始终是明斯克的偏好对手。

tipText.original: Minsc's boastful attitude causes extra enemies to sometimes spawn. Don't worry, Boo can handle them!
tipText.display: 明斯克自吹自擂的态度有时会吸引额外的敌人。但别担心，布可以搞定他们！

upgrades.effectReference: {"effect_string":"buff_upgrades,200,108,109,110,111,112","description":"Increases the effect of Minsc's Favored Enemy ability by $(amount)%."}

description.desc: Whenever Minsc hits a single enemy with his Cleave, he deals $amount% more damage
明斯克使用顺势斩只击中一名敌人时，伤害提升 $amount%
Minsc deals $amount% extra damage against his Favored Enemies
明斯克对偏好敌人造成 $amount% 额外伤害

description.original: What's that, Boo? Go for the what?
description.display: 布布，那是什么东西？你在追什么？

description.original: I shall squeeze you between my enormous biceps!
description.display: 我要用巨大的二头肌压碎你！

description.original: Did I ever tell you about the time I cut off two dragon heads in one breath?
description.display: 我有没有说过我一口气砍掉两个龙头的故事？

description.original: You don't want me to lead the fight? Fine.
description.display: 你不想让我来领导这场战斗？好吧。

description.original: Boo is best leader of all! Listen to his inspiring message!
description.display: 布布是最好的首领！听听他鼓舞人心的发言！

description.original: Who gave Boo three horns? Minsc wants three horns!
description.display: 谁给了布布 3 个角？明斯克想要 3 个角！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Minsc's Favored Enemy abilities by $(amount)%.

description.original: Acting? Yes! Minsc is world's greatest actor!
description.display: 表演？是的，明斯克是世上最伟大的演员！

description.original: This smells of EVIL! But I trust you. I just put it in my eye?
description.display: 这东西一股邪恶的气味！但我相信你。把它放进我的眼睛里？

description.original: Minsc knows how to best a foe. Throw Boo.
description.display: 明斯克知道该如何打败敌人。把布布扔出去就行。

description.original: I--and my medium giant space hamster--will defend you!
description.display: 我--和我的中等巨型太空仓鼠--会保护你的！
